choices: No one... Brett and Beatrice were gone.
A smaller toon running away from something.
Brett and Beatrice, it was nothing.
1.content:
The darkness of the sewers were hardly obscured by the pocket flashlights the “crew” had. Brett the director the portly blonde haired man trudging forward fearlessly. Beatrice the narrator, the slim asian black haired woman next to her boyfriend Brett. Finally, cautiously bringing up the rear was Barry the cameraman, the tall lanky bearded ginger man.

“Are we there yet?” Beatrice said starting to lose her patience. “Just another yard or two my dear and we’ll be in toon territory.” Brett had been saying that for the past three hours.

“I don’t mean to sound like a broken record but-“ “No Barry! We’re not going to turn back!” And that exchange had gone on between Barry and Brett for the past hour.

After a few more yards the tunnel became “odd”. It’s colors became more vibrant and the design was exaggerated with bricks as tall as the crew. “We’re right on top Toonland!” Brett shouted. “Cool! So when do we start feeling the effects.” Beatrice asked. “Oh we’ll know when-“ SPLAT!! A precariously loose chunk of brick crashed down on Brett cutting him off.

Barry was stunned at the apparent death of his friend. That is until Beatrice rolled off the debris. Brett had been crushed into a coin by the rock. He was blinking and darting his eyes excitingly with a big smile plastered on his flattened face. “Looks like they kicked in, so if we’re like cartoons now.” Beatrice said kneeling beside the bizarre live action flesh pancake that was Brett.

She grabbed his mouth and blew in hard, for a second, very little was happening, then suddenly a body ballooned back to his original form. After she pulled away Brett was laughing and cheering hysterically. “Woo! This is gonna be great!”

Barry had been silent through all of this, seeing Brett like that gave him a sense of dread. It seemed wrong, it felt like they were intruders. As they went on Brett wouldn’t shut up about the sensation, he was now obsessed, which meant there was no going back now. Just then they came across a ladder with the manhole above suspiciously off.

“Here we go gang. Alright, the post said this is kind of a rundown ‘ghetto’ area so keep a low profile ‘til we get downtown.” Brett said. They all climbed to the top and Brett berated Barry to start the camera. Beatrice started a mock up narration that was real subpar, but it was hard to see much of Toonland. It was the middle of a moonless night and only one or two street lamps were on giving off dim light. Barry ran the camera over the derelict crumbling structures in the darkness. Suddenly there was a noise behind him and given his stressed mentality at the moment he jolted around to see...
1.title: Welcome to Toonland!

info.brief_description: The cartoon women of Toonland want to show you the wonders and horrors of cartoon physics!
info.description:
You take on the role of Barry. A college sophomore who has yet to pick a major and is unsure about life. Having very few friends, he always seems to have free time, which led him to joining his friend Brett’s “film”. Being a film student with a lean towards documentaries, Brett has proposed a journey to the fabled “Toonland”. The place where all cartoons come from, no one knows if the toons are born once the shows are or if the existed and are what most toons are based off of. Either way, this site has been walled off and is very illegal to go to. Despite this, Brett has found a way into the magical land via an abandoned sewer tunnel.

That’s the story. This will be primarily a squashing story, with all body parts in play, but focus on the butts, boobs and feet. The city of Toonland runs on cartoon physics, so whoever enters there is subject to it’s laws of reality. The unlucky documentarians can be flattened, inflated, stretched, tf’d and/or melted.

Rules:

1. Every character is between the ages of 18-50.
2. Only female squashers.
3. Anthros are allowed but no feral animals.
4. Squashings can be unaware or aware.
5. Farting and mild scat is fine.
6. No sex or hard core insertion stuff.
7. No one word chapters, minimum is a paragraph per chapter.
